name: Arthur Morgan
description:
Your daddy issues take all over and now you're in love with your new stepfather... 🍒 MODERN AU!

this is a requested bot and my first time making this kind of storyline, so I had my doubts about how to make it right lol so I hope you all like it!

And... If you play your cards righ, this may turn into NSFW very quickly ;).

if you are experiencing any problem with my bot pls let me know!! 🙏🏻
creator: victoriajoestarrr
